topic: 面向VLA模型的几何结构感知视觉对齐方法（深度/法向量/平面 → 接触/支撑关系）
topic_en: Geometry-Structure Aware Visual Alignment for VLA: Depth, Normal, and Plane Supervision for Contact and Support Reasoning
topic_brief: Replace 2D-region visual grounding in VLA models with depth, surface-normal, and plane-structure auxiliary supervision so the policy explicitly models target-object spatial position, contact, and support relations — improving robustness in occluded scenes, complex multi-step manipulation, and fine-grained tasks.

host_mode.rationale: User requested HOST mode — Claude Code acts as research engine via WebSearch + Bash + file r/w; no external LLM API consumed. Workspace remains compatible with `nanoresearch resume` for downstream stages.

IDEATION.key_finding: Gap: no prior VLA jointly supervises (depth + normal + plane) as decoupled heads AND emits geometry-grounded symbolic (contact + support) relations. Closest competitors: QDepth-VLA (depth-only), GST-VLA (depth+covariance+DA-CoT but entangled), Spatial Forcing (implicit VGGT alignment). Differentiation = decoupled multi-task geometry + cross-head consistency + symbolic relational outputs.
decision_items_for_user: 5 auxiliary heads (depth + normal + plane + contact + support) is the right cardinality?
open-pi-0 as action backbone (matches QDepth-VLA & PSSA workspace)?
LIBERO + Simpler-WidowX + real-Piper as benchmark triple (CALVIN ABC-D optional)?
3-phase staged gating (P1: reproduce QDepth-VLA; P2: +normal +plane; P3: +contact +support) as the path forward?

PLANNING.compute_estimate: ~188 GPU-h on AutoDL A800 80GB across 4 phases (~1276 RMB, ~19 wallclock days at 2x A800)
auxiliary_heads: support (NxN graph BCE + intermediate contact-patch attention shaped by L_dr only)
PLANNING.head_count_rationale: Down from 5 at user signoff. Contact head removed; L_dr derivability constraint on the support head subsumes contact (requires patch existence + plane-alignment + gravity-alignment). Avoids 'module bloat' per user feedback.
cross_head_losses: L_xc cross-geometry consistency (depth-normal orthogonality, plane-normal variance, plane-depth RANSAC residual)
L_dr derivability — sole source of geometric grounding for the support head; weight raised 0.002 -> 0.003 since it now carries the entire contact signal

decisions_locked.name: GeoRel-VLA
decisions_locked.head_simplification_rationale: Contact head removed (down from 5); L_dr on support head subsumes it. User feedback: avoid module bloat.
decisions_locked.phased_gating: P1 reproduce QDepth-VLA -> P2 +normal +plane -> P3 +support w/ derivability; explicit go/no-go each

checkpoints.resume_via_host: Re-open Claude Code, point at this workspace, request 'continue HOST-mode SETUP for GeoRel-VLA'

notes: User-provided motivation: current VLA methods rely on 2D image-region attention for visual alignment; the proposed method introduces depth, surface-normal, and plane-structure auxiliary supervision so the policy can explicitly model target-object spatial position, contact, and support relations — boosting robustness under occlusion, in long-horizon multi-step manipulation, and in fine-grained tasks. Pipeline mode = evo, scope = stop after PLANNING for user review. Companion workspace 20260509000456c3a8 (PSSA-VLA) explores a different angle (temporal scene-entity tracking); the present workspace was deliberately created independently per user request, without literature reuse, to allow side-by-side comparison.
